byContinuingYouAgreeToOur: By continuing, you agree to our
introLocationHeadingFG: See How You Move Through Your Day
introLocationTopDescriptionFG: Location helps us recognize patterns like your commute, daily routine, frequently visited places, and how your environment may shape your lifestyle.
introLocationBtmDescriptionFG: This only works while the app is open and in use.
introLocationHeadingBG: Build a Fuller Picture of Your Day
introLocationTopDescriptionBG: Background location helps us capture your full daily movement — even when the app is closed — so your patterns stay accurate and nothing gets missed.
introLocationBtmDescriptionBG: This helps create more accurate and meaningful insights in the web version.
introHealthTopDescription: Health data helps us understand signals like sleep, steps, activity, heart rate, and recovery patterns.
introHealthBtmDescription: By connecting this, your web dashboard can show more personalized insights about your energy, rest, stress, and overall lifestyle rhythm.
introScreenTopDescription: Screen time helps us understand app usage, unlock patterns, focus time, bedtime phone use, and digital habits.
introScreenBtmDescription: This helps your web dashboard create better insights around attention, balance, rest, and productivity.
introBatteryHeading: Optimize Battery Usage for Seamless Syncing
introBatteryTopDescription: To ensure your data syncs smoothly in the background, we recommend optimizing your battery settings for Dotsin Connector.
introBatteryBtmDescription: This allows the app to run efficiently without interruptions, ensuring you get the most accurate and timely insights on your web dashboard.
connectorTopDescription: Connect your approved data sources so we can better understand your daily routines, activity, movement, and digital habits.
connectorBtmDescription: This app only helps connect and organize your data. Your personalized insights, reports, and recommendations will be available in the web version.
introNotificationTopDescription: Notifications let us share timely updates like new insights, data sync reminders, and important changes to your connected sources.
introNotificationBtmDescription: This helps you stay informed about your progress and never miss meaningful updates from your web dashboard.
reassurance: You're always in control of what you choose to connect.
emailValidationError: Please enter a valid email address
phoneNumberValidationError: Please enter a valid phone number
byCheckingBox: By checking this box, you agree to our
pleaseFillAllFields: Please fill all the fields correctly.
pleaseAcceptTerms: Please accept the terms and conditions.
enterTheCodeSentToPhone: Enter the code sent to your phone number
enterTheCodeSentToEmail: Enter the code sent to your email address
nowLetsTuneAI: Now, let's tune the AI to your needs with a quick setup.
soWeCanPersonalise: So we can personalise your experience...
letsGetSomePermissions: To give you the best experience, we need access to a few features. You're always in control and can change this anytime.
screenTimeAccessDescription: To analyse your Screen Time on this device, Dotsin will need your permission.
screenTimeAccessDescription2: On the next screen, turn on the toggle for Dotsin to access your Screen Time data. This will allow us to provide you with insights and analytics about your screen usage.
notifLogsAccessDescription: To analyse your Notification logs on this device, Dotsin will need your permission.
notifLogsAccessDescription2: On the next screen, turn on the toggle for Dotsin to access your Notification logs. This will allow us to provide you with insights and analytics about your notifications.
healthAccessDescription: Sync your wearable device to reveal your Recovery, Sleep, and Activity trends.
healthAccessDescription2: On the next screen, turn on the toggle for Dotsin to access your health data. This will allow us to provide you with insights and analytics about your health and wellness.
healthStepIOS1: Step 1: Make sure all health data categories are toggled on.
healthStepAndroid1: Step 1: Toggle on Allow All and scroll down to the bottom.
healthStepAndroid3: Step 3: Toggle on Access Past Data and Access Data in the Background.
pleaseGrantPermissions: Please grant the required permissions to continue.
insufficientPermsDescription: It seems like you haven't granted all the necessary permissions. Please go to settings and enable the required permissions to continue using the app.
screenTimePermsDescription: To provide you with insights and analytics about your screen usage, we need access to your Screen Time data. Please go to settings and enable the Screen Time permission for Dotsin.
notificationPermsDescription: To provide you with insights and analytics about your notifications, we need access to your notification data. Please go to settings and enable the notification access permission for Dotsin.
healthPermsDescription: To provide you with insights and analytics about your health data, we need access to your health data. Please go to settings and enable the health permission for Dotsin.
interestHobbiesDescription: Everything starts with a clear goal.
yourAnswersHelp: Your answers help personalize your experience. You can skip any question.
personalizedInsightsDesc: Personalized insights based on your activity, health, and routines.
todaysBriefDescription: A quick snapshot of your day, including key insights and trends based on your data.
healthDescription: All health data in one place.
